title: CRDT library choice for conflict resolution
context: Multiple devices may edit the same note offline; we need a deterministic merge.
decision: Adopt Yjs for CRDT primitives, wrapped in a thin domain layer.
consequences: Adds ~50 KB to the bundle. Removes the bulk of custom conflict-handling code. Locks us to a Yjs-compatible wire format.

alternativesConsidered.name: Automerge
alternativesConsidered.summary: Comparable CRDT library with a different runtime profile.
alternativesConsidered.reasonNotChosen: Bundle size larger; ecosystem smaller at evaluation time.

alternativesConsidered.name: Hand-rolled three-way merge
alternativesConsidered.reasonNotChosen: Too much edge-case complexity for a small team.
